_publications._publicationTitle: Sex Is a major determinant of neuronal dysfunction in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: female Nf1-CKO mice had ~2-fold more retinal ganglion cell death (RGC apoptosis; Fig 2C) relative to their male counterparts
details: Female Nf1-CKO mice had ~2-fold more retinal ganglion cell death (RGC apoptosis) relative to male counterparts
